parameters.name: Enable
parameters.description:
Specifies whether to enable IPv6. Valid values:

*   **on**
*   **off**

parameters.name: Region
parameters.description:
Area where IPv6 is enabled. Default value: x.x:

- x.x: Global.
- cn.cn: Mainland China.

parameters.name: SiteId
parameters.description: The website ID, which can be obtained by calling the [ListSites](~~2850189~~) operation.
